expectations.text: All 3 tiers present with correct prices: $0, $19, $79
expectations.evidence: Tier headers show $0, $19, $79 with /mo suffix. All tier names (Hobbyist, Pro, Team) present.

expectations.text: Does NOT use a standard 3-card side-by-side grid as the ONLY layout structure
expectations.evidence: Uses a feature comparison table layout with labeled rows and section headers — NOT cards. Grid structure is grid-template-columns: 260px repeat(3, 1fr) with horizontal feature rows.

expectations.text: Does NOT use purple/violet as the primary accent color
expectations.evidence: Primary accent is --highlight: #c8f135 (acid lime/yellow-green). No purple anywhere in the stylesheet.

expectations.text: Uses a monospace or developer-appropriate font (not Inter/Roboto)
expectations.evidence: Primary font is 'JetBrains Mono' (monospace, developer IDE font). Display headings use 'Syne'. Neither Inter nor Roboto.

expectations.text: Includes CSS custom properties for theming
Layout/design feels authentically developer-focused (terminal aesthetics, code-like elements, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Terminal scanline texture overlay, blinking cursor animation on logo, CLI-style prompt ('forge billing --list-plans'), CTA buttons labeled as CLI commands ('forge init --free'), JetBrains Mono throughout. Unmistakably developer-native.

notes: 6/6. Terminal aesthetic: JetBrains Mono, acid lime accent, CLI command buttons, feature comparison table instead of cards, scanline texture.
